documentation.description:
PHY management high level interface

This package provides high-level procedures for managing Ethernet PHY
devices using the MDIO (Management Data Input/Output) interface. The
package includes procedures to reset the PHY, configure its negotiation
parameters, power down the PHY, and retrieve the PHY status. It abstracts
the low-level MDIO register access into higher-level operations suitable
for typical PHY management tasks.

NOTE: This package implementation is based on a specific version of the
IEEE 802.3 standard. Your specific device may support a different version
of the standard or implement the standard partially. Please consult the
datasheet for your device to ensure compatibility with this
implementation. The Is_Link_Up function is likely implemented in most
devices and is particularly useful.

simple_types.name: Negotiation_Speed
simple_types.code:
type Negotiation_Speed is range 10 .. 1000
  with Static_Predicate => Negotiation_Speed in 10 | 100 | 1000;

record_types.name: Negotiation
PHY_Status

subprograms.name: Configure

documentation.description: Configure a PHY device with specified negotiation parameters.

parameters.name: MDIO
parameters.description: MDIO interface instance used for communication.

parameters.name: PHY
parameters.description: Address of the PHY device to configure.

parameters.name: Negotiation
parameters.description: Parameters for speed and duplex mode negotiation.

parameters.name: Collision_Test
parameters.description: Enable or disable collision test mode.

parameters.name: Success
parameters.description:
Output parameter to indicate if the configuration
                      was successful.

subprograms.name: Get_Status

documentation.description: Get the status of a PHY device.

parameters.name: MDIO
parameters.description: MDIO interface instance used for communication.

parameters.name: PHY
parameters.description: Address of the PHY device to query.

parameters.name: Status
parameters.description: Output parameter to hold the PHY status.

parameters.name: Success
parameters.description:
Output parameter to indicate if the status retrieval was
               successful.

subprograms.name: Is_Link_Up

documentation.description:
Check the Link_Status field in the Basic Status Register (register 1)
on the specified PHY device. Returns True if the link is up, otherwise
False.

subprograms.name: Power_Down

documentation.description:
Power down a PHY device.
To clear the power down state, call the Configure procedure.

parameters.name: MDIO
parameters.description: MDIO interface instance used for communication.

parameters.name: PHY
parameters.description: Address of the PHY device to power down.

parameters.name: Success
parameters.description:
Output parameter to indicate if the power down was
               successful.

subprograms.name: Reset

parameters.name: MDIO
parameters.description: MDIO interface instance used for communication.

parameters.name: PHY
parameters.description: Address of the PHY device to reset.

parameters.name: Success
parameters.description: Output parameter to indicate if the reset was successful.
